_comment: Test harness — exercises every edge case: bare strings, metadata objects, long text (soft-cap), empty section (placeholder), missing keys, column wrap (>5 items), and extra[] with both flat items and nested children.
projectSnapshot: Replaces the legacy email + PDF setup flow

customers: Setup takes 40+ minutes end to end

customers.text: Users abandon at the billing connection step because they don't have admin card access on hand and there's no way to invite a colleague to finish it for them

customers: No visibility into how many steps remain

business.text: High support load — onboarding is the #1 ticket driver

business: Sales spends time on manual setup calls

requirements: Skip a step and resume later
Invite a teammate to complete a step
users: Ops admins setting up on the owner's behalf

hypotheses.text: A guided wizard with visible progress lifts activation vs the current doc

hypotheses: Letting users invite a teammate reduces billing-step drop-off
Most abandonment is at billing, not profile setup

currentState: Manual setup doc emailed after signup

dataFeedback.text: Avg 2.4 support tickets per new account in week 1

research.text: Users want to see how much is left before they start
Non-technical owners delegate setup but the tool assumes one person

risks: Billing API rate limits during peak signup
Scope creep into full account settings
assumptions: Email is verified before onboarding starts
issues: Legacy accounts lack structured profile data
dependencies: Payments team API for billing step

useCases: Owner delegates setup to an ops admin
_intentionally_missing: note: 'requirements' present but try deleting a key to confirm empty-section placeholder. 'collaborations.forums' etc all filled here.

extra.title: Open Questions
items: Mobile onboarding in scope for v1?
What happens to half-finished sessions after 7 days?
